ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email contact for the station */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone contact for the station */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the station */,
  "establishment_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was established */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the station (active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quadrats" (
  "quadrat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quadrat */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the station the quadrat belongs to */,
  "quadrat_number" INTEGER /* Quadrat number within the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the quadrat */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the quadrat */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the quadrat */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the quadrat in square meters */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the quadrat (permanent, temporary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quadrat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quadrats_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection */,
  "quadrat_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quadrat the data collection belongs to */,
  "sampled_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was sampled */,
  "scanned_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was scanned */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data collection */,
  "collector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who collected the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collections_quadrat_id FOREIGN KEY ("quadrat_id") REFERENCES quadrats ("quadrat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collections_collector_id FOREIGN KEY ("collector_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entry */,
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data collection the entry belongs to */,
  "entry1_date" TEXT /* Date of entry1 */,
  "entry2_date" TEXT /* Date of entry2 */,
  "database_date" TEXT /* Date when the entry was added to the database */,
  "entry_type" TEXT /* Type of entry (e.g., vegetation, species) */,
  "data" TEXT /* JSON or XML data for the entry */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the entry */,
  "entry_user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entries_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_id") REFERENCES data_collections ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entries_entry_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the user (active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON or XML data for user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data collection being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_id") REFERENCES data_collections ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "taxa" (
  "taxon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each taxon */,
  "taxon_name" TEXT /* Name of the taxon */,
  "classification" TEXT /* Classification of the taxon (e.g., species, family) */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the taxon */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the taxon */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the taxon */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status (e.g., endangered, vulnerable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("taxon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "taxon_collections" (
  "taxon_collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each taxon-collection relationship */,
  "taxon_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the taxon */,
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data collection */,
  "abundance" INTEGER /* Abundance of the taxon in the collection */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the taxon in the collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("taxon_collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_taxon_collections_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_id") REFERENCES data_collections ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_taxon_collections_taxon_id FOREIGN KEY ("taxon_id") REFERENCES taxa ("taxon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quadrat_taxa" (
  "quadrat_taxon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quadrat-taxon relationship */,
  "quadrat_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quadrat */,
  "taxon_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the taxon */,
  "abundance" INTEGER /* Abundance of the taxon in the quadrat */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the taxon in the quadrat */,
  "last_observation_date" TEXT /* Date of the last observation of the taxon in the quadrat */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the taxon in the quadrat */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quadrat_taxon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quadrat_taxa_taxon_id FOREIGN KEY ("taxon_id") REFERENCES taxa ("taxon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quadrat_taxa_quadrat_id FOREIGN KEY ("quadrat_id") REFERENCES quadrats ("quadrat_id")
)
